channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Suspect in student killings asked ChatGPT about body disposal
Man charged with Trump assassination attempt at WHCD
King and queen arrive in US for state visit
item.description: First-ever US state visit for British royals to DC, NYC, and Virginia.

item.title: Senators investigate Kuwait strike that killed US troops
item.description: Surviving troops say unit was unprepared, dispute Pentagon account.
